isolation.dataMutationBoundary: Temporary DB fixture mutations allowed for assigned assertions only; all cleanup completed and verified.

steps.action: Backup category display flags and set all categories to cat_display='no'
steps.expected: Homepage category grid renders empty-state without crashing
steps.observed: No categories message displayed, category cards count=0, page remained functional

steps.expected: No categories UI appears and article sections still render
steps.observed: "No categories have been created yet." present; Most Popular and Recent sections remained visible

evidence.network: Homepage loaded via browser with empty-category fixture; no UI runtime failures observed.

steps.action: Backup article display flags and set all articles to article_display='n'
steps.expected: Popular and Recent sections render empty state without errors
steps.observed: Both sections rendered "No articles found." and contained zero list items

steps.expected: No crash and empty placeholders/messages shown
steps.observed: No-articles message count=2 (Most Popular + Recent), layout remained intact

evidence.network: Homepage loaded via browser with empty-articles fixture; no UI runtime failures observed.

steps.expected: A query with >2 matches should paginate

steps.action: Submit advanced search for "php" and inspect page 1
steps.expected: Pagination controls appear when total > per-page
steps.observed: Results page showed "Page 1 of 3" with Previous/Next controls
Page 2 titles differed from page 1 and pagination updated to "Page 2 of 3"

steps.action: Insert expired search cache row (search_date=now-3700) for hash a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f90
steps.expected: Expired hash should be deleted/invalid on access
Expired hash removed after clean-up path
steps.observed: search row count for fixture hash was 0 after access and remained 0 after explicit cleanup

evidence.network: GET /api/search/results/a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f90?page=1 -> 404 {"error":"Search results not found or expired"}.

setupActions: UPDATE settings SET option_value='2' WHERE option_name='site_max_search'
cleanupActions: UPDATE settings SET option_value='20' WHERE option_name='site_max_search'

setupActions: INSERT INTO search (search_id, search_date, search_keywords, search_user_id, search_ip, search_total) VALUES ('a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f90', now-3700, '{"keywords":"ut_rerun_stateful_expired","categoryId":null}', 0, 'ut_rerun_stateful_expired_ip', 1)
cleanupActions: Accessed expired hash URL to trigger cleanExpiredSearchCache

setupActions: CREATE TABLE ut_rerun_stateful_backup_categories AS SELECT cat_id, cat_display FROM categories
cleanupActions: UPDATE categories SET cat_display=(SELECT cat_display FROM ut_rerun_stateful_backup_categories WHERE cat_id=categories.cat_id)

setupActions: CREATE TABLE ut_rerun_stateful_backup_articles AS SELECT article_id, article_display FROM articles
cleanupActions: UPDATE articles SET article_display=(SELECT article_display FROM ut_rerun_stateful_backup_articles WHERE article_id=articles.article_id)

frictions.description: agent-browser semantic locators for Keywords/Search were ambiguous because both header quick-search and advanced search form expose similar labels.
frictions.resolution: Switched to snapshot refs (@e9/@e20) for deterministic targeting of advanced search controls.

frictions.description: agent-browser network export returned "No requests captured" for one search capture attempt.
frictions.resolution: Captured supplemental curl API evidence with explicit HTTP status and payload details.

testingLearnings: In this dataset, using a temporary site_max_search reduction is a lower-risk way to exercise pagination than bulk article insertion.
Search hash expiration can be validated deterministically by inserting a hash older than 3600 seconds and immediately loading /search/results/{hash}.
summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions: 4 passed (VAL-HOME-004, VAL-HOME-005, VAL-SEARCH-004, VAL-SEARCH-008). Temporary fixture mutations were fully cleaned up and restoration was verified in fixture-cleanup-verification.txt.
